chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-2321 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13-5-2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In compliance of order dated 08-4-2025, Executive Engineer, Irrigation East Division Khairpur (respondent No.6) files statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record. Counsel for the petitioner also submits statement along with certain documents, which is also taken on record. Upon perusal of petition, comments and report furnished by respondent No.6, we are of the view that there appears civil dispute between the parties and they have already sue against each other before the competent civil courts. In view of above, the instant petition being meritless is hereby dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach before the competent civil forum, for redressal of his grievance, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
